gist.headline: Sweetening the BYOP pot
gist.blurb: We've simplified how Bring Your Own Pollen (BYOP) billing works under the hood. Now, when your app users spend pollen, your creator markup flows seamlessly into the right honey jar!
gist.summary: Simplified the Bring Your Own Pollen (BYOP) margin billing system to explicitly track creator markups and route earnings to the correct balance buckets.
gist.impact: App creators can now easily opt-in to rewards per API key and reliably earn pollen when users generate content through their apps.
gist.visual_concept: Billing, balances, and 'Bring Your Own Pollen' (BYOP) creator rewards. Visual symbols: honey jars representing balance buckets, glowing pollen drops representing credits. Polly the bee acting as an accountant or shopkeeper organizing the earnings.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny green accountant visor, carefully pouring glowing golden pollen drops from a large glass jar into smaller jars. A chunky retro cash register sits on a wooden desk nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
